raw.objective: To develop a PK model for zonisamide and to study the influence of carbamazepine on the disposition of zonisamide.
raw.observations: The authors estimated Michaelis-Menten elimination, suggesting that instead of induction, ZNS kinetics is subject to nonlinearity which may severely complicate its use (see PHT). Carbamazepine increased the clearance of zonisamide by 13% when co-administered. They assumed complete bioavailability after oral administration.
raw.equations: SIZE = 33*((WT/33)**theta1) Vd=theta3*SIZE Vm=theta4*SIZE*(theta2**CBZ) Km=theta5*(1+eta1) CL = (Vm-D)/Km Cipred=(DD/Vd)*exp(-(CL/Vd)*time)/(1-exp(-(CL/Vd)*Tau)) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) DD is the daily dose in mg. CBZ is comedication with carbamazepine (0=no; 1=yes) Tau is the dosing interval in hours
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.741 theta2=1.13 theta3=1.27 theta4=27.6 theta5=45.9 omega1=0.0882 sigma1=0.0317

extraction_target.title: Population analysis of the dose-dependent pharmacokinetics of zonisamide in epileptic patients.

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: SIZE = 33*((WT/33)**theta1) Vd=theta3*SIZE Vm=theta4*SIZE*(theta2**CBZ) Km=theta5*(1+eta1) CL = (Vm-D)/Km Cipred=(DD/Vd)*exp(-(CL/Vd)*time)/(1-exp(-(CL/Vd)*Tau)) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) DD is the daily dose in mg. CBZ is comedication with carbamazepine (0=no; 1=yes) Tau is the dosing interval in hours
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: To develop a PK model for zonisamide and to study the influence of carbamazepine on the disposition of zonisamide.

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
